sentences.arabic: فِي رَأْيِي، الْوَقْتُ أَغْلَى مِنَ الْمَالِ.
sentences.translation: Po mom mišljenju, vrijeme je vrednije od novca.
sentences.translationEn: In my opinion, time is more precious than money.

sentences.arabic: الْمَالُ يُمْكِنُ أَنْ يَعُودَ لَكِنَّ الْوَقْتَ لَا يَعُودُ.
sentences.translation: Novac se može vratiti ali se vrijeme ne može vratiti.
sentences.translationEn: Money can come back but time cannot come back.

sentences.arabic: أَحَاوِلُ أَنْ أَسْتَخْدِمَ وَقْتِي فِي أَشْيَاءَ مُفِيدَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Trudim se koristiti svoje vrijeme za korisne stvari.
sentences.translationEn: I try to use my time for useful things.

sentences.arabic: لَا أُحِبُّ تَضْيِيعَ الْوَقْتِ فِي مَا لَا يَنْفَعُ.
sentences.translation: Ne volim gubiti vrijeme na ono što ne koristi.
sentences.translationEn: I do not like wasting time on what is not useful.
